glm52_quota_workaround: Preserve canonical GLM-5.2 -> GLM-5.1 -> Qwen fallback documentation; start Stage 5 at GLM-5.1 then Qwen while GLM-5.2 exhausted. This run started at Tier 3 (Qwen) directly.
deterministic_alternation_rule: Read last_used from .conductor/validator-alternation.json; dispatch opposite validator; flip last_used. Guarantees exact 50/50 Tera/M3 per two consecutive validation runs.
title: MiniMax M3 Half-Usage Agent Routing
stage8_blockers_resolved: B-3 runtime smoke test (Tera side passed 2026-07-17 ses_08f4a813cffewvxXj3YSlS0UNp; M3 side passed 2026-07-17 ses_08f324508ffeVw5cvmUdCr5375; live alternation dispatch executed 2026-07-17 report validation-report-20260717-160109Z.md)
pipeline_rationale: The work is configuration/agent/process-only, but routing capability and exact active inventory remain uncertain. Stage 5 used Qwen (Tier 3) while GLM-5.2 and GLM-5.1 quota exhausted; deterministic PowerShell checks replace TDD.
model_routing_proposal: Fixed pins with paired agents and persisted strict-alternation validator selection (native weighted routing unsupported; SHA-256 parity rejected as non-exact; replaced by persisted strict alternation).

runtime_evidence.scope: Proves explicit Tera Medium model-resolution works post-restart. Does not by itself execute a Stage 7 alternation dispatch.
runtime_evidence.command: opencode run --model openai/gpt-5.6-terra --variant medium --format json "Reply with exactly: routing-ready"

m3_runtime_evidence.scope: Proves explicit MiniMax M3 model-resolution works post-restart. Combined with Tera smoke and Stage 7 dispatch, confirms both sides of the alternation pair are operationally valid.
m3_runtime_evidence.command: opencode run --model opencode-go/minimax-m3 --format json "Reply with exactly: routing-ready"
